subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1914-06-29
subcodes.first_line: O let me weep like unto the vernal showers of the Spring!... This day is the day of parting. The farewell hour is most difficult to bear.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
